title: viola nummulariifolia
intro: Viola nummulariifolia, also known as the Money Plant Viola, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Violet family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Viola nummulariifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
